note: AppMagic's official API uses HTTP Basic (account login:password via APPMAGIC_LOGIN/APPMAGIC_PASSWORD); the operator explicitly declined to use any company credential for this clean-room build, and the web tier's APPMAGIC_WEB_TOKEN is likewise unavailable. The CLI was verified against exit codes, mocks, dry-run, and 191 structural checks; live behavioral proof awaits a credentialed user.
